title: Section 82
content: 1[2[The Corporation]] may make regulations for the transaction of business at its meeting: Provided that the time, place and procedure for the first meeting after the constitution of 3[4[the Corporation]] under section 3 shall be determined by the Administrator.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2, for “The Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “A Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022). 3. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 4. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
